## Summary
- What changed?
- Why?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`

## MCP contract impact
- [ ] No tool input/output contract changes
- [ ] Contract changes documented in README/CONTRIBUTING
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered

## Notes
Additional context, migration notes, or follow-up tasks.
